_doc: EXPANDED multi-concept synthetic contrast set for the E7 bootstrap-extraction confirmation (scripts/confirm_e7_boot.py). ~30 diverse pairs per concept so that bootstrap-resampling the contrast set yields meaningfully DIFFERENT steering vectors (the unit of replication), not correlated redraws of a tiny pool. Hand-written, clearly synthetic, no copyrighted text. pos = expresses the concept; neg = a neutral, mundane, concept-free sentence. Kept SEPARATE from concepts_multi.json so prior experiments (which used the 8-pair version) and their activation caches are unaffected.
